description: Unofficial LaTeX template for the International Astronautical Congress (IAC), fulfilling the manuscript style guidelines dictated by the International Astronautical Federation (IAF). Provides the required two-column format, paper ID/copyright/location/date header fields, multi-author and multi-affiliation blocks with ORCID and corresponding-author markers, abstract, nomenclature and acronym sections, numbered sections with Roman-numeral styling, figure/table/equation formatting, appendix handling, and a customized bibliography, based on a custom document class.
